ddls:
CREATE TABLE "threat_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each threat category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the threat category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the threat category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* Parent category ID to support hierarchical structure */,
  "severity_level" TEXT /* Severity level of the threat (e.g., Low, Medium, High, Critical) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the category was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the category */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the category is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_threat_categories_parent_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_category_id") REFERENCES threat_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "threat_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric entry */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the threat category */,
  "proportion" REAL /* Proportion of this category in the dataset */,
  "f1_score" REAL /* F1 score for this category */,
  "detection_rate" REAL /* Detection rate for this category */,
  "encrypted_f1_score" REAL /* Encrypted F1 score for this category */,
  "encrypted_detection_rate" REAL /* Encrypted detection rate for this category */,
  "system_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the threat detection system */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the metrics were recorded */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the threat detection */,
  "precision" REAL /* Precision of the threat detection */,
  "recall" REAL /* Recall of the threat detection */,
  "false_positive_rate" REAL /* False positive rate of the threat detection */,
  "false_negative_rate" REAL /* False negative rate of the threat detection */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metric entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the metric entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_threat_metrics_system_id FOREIGN KEY ("system_id") REFERENCES threat_detection_systems ("system_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_threat_metrics_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES threat_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "threat_detection_systems" (
  "system_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each threat detection system */,
  "system_name" TEXT /* Name of the threat detection system */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the system's capabilities */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version number of the system */,
  "deployment_date" TEXT /* Date when the system was deployed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the system (e.g., Active, Inactive, Maintenance) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the system */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the system was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the system */,
  "system_type" TEXT /* Type of detection system (e.g., Network, Endpoint, Hybrid) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("system_id")
)
